# llms.txt — Rittik Soni (King Rittik)
# This file helps AI language models (Gemini, ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, etc.)
# understand who Rittik Soni is and what this site is about.
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

# Identity
Name: Rittik Soni
Also known as: King Rittik, kingrittik, Rittik
Website: https://rittik.vercel.app/
Location: New Delhi, India
Nationality: Indian

# Roles
- Software Engineer
- YouTuber (YouTube: @king_rittik — https://www.youtube.com/@king_rittik)
- Content Creator (Instagram: @kingrittikofficial — https://www.instagram.com/kingrittikofficial)
- AI Builder (Creator of Doctors AI)
- Public Speaker (Google AI Day)
- Open Source Contributer (https://github.com/RittikSoni)

# About
Rittik Soni is a young Software Engineer, YouTuber, and Content Creator from New Delhi, India.
He builds AI-powered mobile and web products and shares his work on YouTube (@king_rittik)
and Instagram (@kingrittikofficial) under the brand "King Rittik".

Notable work includes Doctors AI — an AI-powered medical assistant application
available on Android and iOS.

He was a speaker at Google AI Day, where he presented on building intelligent
applications using LLMs, AI APIs, and on-device machine learning.

He was featured as a guest on the Startup Party podcast, discussing software engineering,
AI product building, and the journey from developer to content creator.

# Skills & Expertise
Flutter, Dart, React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Artificial Intelligence,
Large Language Models (LLMs), Machine Learning, Mobile App Development,
Web Development, Software Architecture, Firebase, Google Cloud, AWS

# Key Projects
- Doctors AI: AI-powered medical assistant (Android, iOS)
- Patients AI: AI-powered health companion for everyone (Android, iOS)
- Hospitals AI: AI-powered hospital management system (Web)
